title: selago foliosa
intro: Selago foliosa, also known as Cape jasmine or Cape jasmine vine, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Selago foliosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Selago foliosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
